name: Sign In
purpose: Email/password login form. Issues access and refresh tokens on success, applies user theme preference, and handles cross-origin redirects to the reports app.
actions: Log in with email and password

name: Sign Up
purpose: New-user registration form. Collects name, email, phone, and password; validates reCAPTCHA; creates a PENDING account and sends an email-verification link.

name: Verification Pending
purpose: Holding page shown after signup while the user's email is unverified. Lets the user resend the verification email (rate-limited) or update their email address before verifying.

name: Email Verification
purpose: Consumes the CONFIRM_EMAIL JWT from the email link, activates the account (PENDING → ACTIVE), and auto-assigns the user to a matching company if the email domain matches.
actions: Auto-verify on page load via URL token

name: Forgot Password
purpose: Accepts an email address and sends a password-reset link. Always returns success to prevent email enumeration.

name: Reset Password
purpose: Consumes the RESET_PASSWORD JWT from the email link and sets a new password. Requires password confirmation.
actions: Set new password via email token

name: Portfolio Map
purpose: Displays all company sites on an interactive Google Map with color-coded markers, alongside status summary tables and alarm summaries. Entry point to the fleet overview.
actions: Filter map by status or alarm

name: Portfolio Status
purpose: Detailed table view of all sites with service status, connection status, event counts, and setup progress. Supports search, filtering, and site-note editing. Auto-refreshes every minute.

name: Energy KPIs
purpose: Analytics sub-page showing fleet-wide energy performance charts and key performance indicators.

name: Triage
purpose: Analytics sub-page showing fault monitoring, alert severity, and triage-focused diagnostics for the fleet.

name: Irradiation
purpose: Analytics sub-page showing irradiance and solar resource analytics for the fleet.

name: Site Overview
purpose: KPI dashboard showing real-time energy metrics, status badges, site location map, and site plan for one installation.

name: Site Live View
purpose: Real-time channel data and live readings from the site's connected devices.

name: Site Setup Tracker
purpose: Commissioning checklist showing setup step progress, completion status, and responsibility assignments.

name: General Info
purpose: Editable site metadata including name, location, capacity, contacts, subscription details, and energy model configuration.

name: Hardware / Services
purpose: Hardware inventory, asset records, and service history for the site.

name: Energy Model
purpose: Predicted and learned energy model data, monthly power forecasts, and capacity test analysis.

name: Virtual Site Builder
purpose: Drag-and-drop visual builder for mapping device topology, connections, and site flow (Admin/SuperAdmin only).

name: Channels
purpose: Configuration and status of all data channels including DENO, gateway, modem, Modbus, and OPC servers.

name: Denobox
purpose: File browser for accessing files stored on the site's Denobox device, including configurations and logs.

name: Capacity Test
purpose: Multi-step wizard to configure, run, and download capacity test results for the site.

name: Channel Map
purpose: Visual layout map showing physical channel positions and relationships on the site.

name: Learned Shade Profile
purpose: Shade profile learned from historical irradiance data, showing seasonal shading patterns.

name: Benchmark Alignment
purpose: Tool to align energy model benchmarks against measured data and optimize performance predictions.

name: Energy Accounting
purpose: Detailed energy accounting and disaggregation analytics dashboard for the site.

name: Notifications
purpose: Notification settings for alarms, delivery channels, and notification delay preferences.

name: Site Status
purpose: Real-time status of all channels for one site, showing connection state, last update time, and current metrics.

name: Portfolio Status
purpose: Fleet-wide status table showing all sites with connection, service status, alarms, tasks, and setup progress.

name: Channel Status
purpose: Detailed status view for a selected channel, showing connection state, metrics, and gateway remote management status.

name: Company
purpose: Company profile page where users can view and edit their company information (name, email, contact details) and see all users assigned to the company with their roles and status.

name: Services
purpose: Service management page for configuring service contracts, SLAs, and support terms associated with the company.

name: Quotation Management
purpose: Quotation management hub for creating and managing quotes for new sites. Includes bulk creation, editing, and renewal workflows.

name: Notification Management
purpose: Centralized notification and alert rule configuration. Set thresholds, delivery channels, and escalation policies for site alarms.

name: Global Alarm Configuration
purpose: System-wide alarm settings and thresholds that apply across all sites in the company.

name: Metrics
purpose: Global metric definitions and custom metric library accessible to all authenticated users, regardless of company assignment.

name: Device Types
purpose: Device type library showing specifications for PV modules, inverters, and other solar equipment. Accessible to all authenticated users.

name: Company Management
purpose: SuperAdmin page for managing multiple companies in the system. View, create, and edit all company profiles.

name: Users Management
purpose: SuperAdmin page for managing users across all companies. Edit roles, deactivate users, resend invitations, and manage permissions.

name: Template Management
purpose: SuperAdmin page for managing Modbus register templates used for device driver configuration and data parsing.

name: Module Management
purpose: SuperAdmin page for managing PV module specifications including power rating, efficiency, temperature coefficient, and manufacturer details.

name: Inverter Management
purpose: SuperAdmin page for managing inverter device specifications including power rating, input voltage, topology, and operating parameters.

name: Asset Management
purpose: SuperAdmin page for managing the physical asset inventory including modems, gateways, Denos, and other hardware with serial numbers and status.

name: Remote Management
purpose: SuperAdmin page for configuring remote access tunneling and device management capabilities for gateway and field equipment.

name: Metrics Management
purpose: SuperAdmin page for defining custom metrics and metric aggregations used throughout the platform for analytics and reporting.

name: System Notification
purpose: SuperAdmin page for configuring system-wide email and SMS notification settings, templates, and delivery channels.

name: Cell Modem Plan Management
purpose: SuperAdmin page for managing cellular SIM cards and data plans via Lattigo integration. Monitor data usage, suspend/restore SIMs, and view usage analytics by site.

name: Site Launch
purpose: SuperAdmin page for managing site go-live configuration and commissioning checklist status across the fleet.

name: Activity Logs
purpose: SuperAdmin audit trail showing all user actions in the system with timestamp, user, action type, affected entity, and change details.

name: Analytics Dashboard
purpose: Interactive time-series charting system for visualizing solar site data at channel, site, and portfolio levels. Select from 15+ chart types, customize date ranges, filter by channels and metrics, and export charts as PNG/PDF.

name: Embedded Analytics
purpose: Stripped-down analytics variant for embedding in third-party tools or custom dashboards.

name: Energy Accounting
purpose: Site-level analytics tab using the same charting system, pre-configured to show energy-related charts for that site.

name: Field Setup Intro
purpose: Welcome page for the 3-step field installation wizard. Explains the setup process and guides technicians to begin gateway commissioning.

name: Gateway Setup
purpose: First step of the wizard: select or validate a gateway device by serial number, confirming it exists in the system.

name: List Setup
purpose: Manage Deno devices already linked to the gateway. Add new Denos or remove existing ones.

name: Networking Info
purpose: Configure gateway network settings including IP address, DNS, and gateway parameters.

name: Deno List
purpose: Inventory of all Deno devices with status, signal strength, and discovery controls. Verify Denos are connected.

name: Gateway Live Data
purpose: Real-time data verification from the gateway. Confirms the gateway is connected and sending data.

name: Setup
purpose: Channel configuration and Deno-to-port mapping. Associate discovered Denos with physical channels and configure measurements.

name: Verify Installation
purpose: Final verification checklist and site creation. Confirm all settings and create the site record in the system.

name: Tests
purpose: Performance and diagnostic reporting interface with two modes: View Archive for pre-generated reports or Create New for live test charts. Includes interactive Plotly dashboard with zoom controls, date navigation, and site/timezone-aware filtering.

name: Tests — View Archive
purpose: View pre-generated archived reports: Capacity Test, Energy Test, or Production and Loss. Each report is a static snapshot that can be zoomed and panned.

name: Tests — Create New
purpose: Generate live test charts on demand. Select site, chart type (Capacity, Energy, or Production/Loss), and date range. Date navigation buttons skip to previous/next period of the same duration.
actions: Pick date range or use presets
